_comment: Single source of truth for the Universal Graph Contract (DNA WEBSITE_VISUALIZATION_STANDARD). The three chart renderers — ark-plotly.js (browser), ark_plotly_template.py (server/Streamlit), arkChartTheme.ts (React/recharts) — MUST align to these values so 'legend below', margins, colorway, and tooltip are defined exactly once. When you change a value here, update all three renderers (revendor.ps1 then carson-visual verifies propagation). v1.0 2026-06-18.

legend.note: ALWAYS below the plot — never on top, never overlapping the y-axis label.

hoverlabel.note: Tokens fix the white-on-white hover box.

title.note: Render full title responsively; never truncate or bleed outside the box.

resize.note: Plotly.react diffs (no ghost trace); ResizeObserver re-fits on container resize.
